event_description: A trading signal was produced for a futures contract with a confidence score.
A real-time signal evaluation cycle completed across all enabled trading pairs.
A futures position was successfully closed with its PnL and closing reason.
A position close attempt failed and will be retried.
The trading kill-switch was activated, halting all order placement.
Trading was resumed after a halt.
A futures contract rollover was completed, moving positions from an expiring contract to the next.
Positions were imported (or replaced) from Coinbase via the admin UI.
A manual signal evaluation was triggered via the signals API endpoint.
A Slack slash command was received and processed by the bot.
A daily paper-trading performance summary was sent to Slack.
A critical background job (swing position management) failed and raised an alert.
